task_updates.executor_notes: Direct staging verification is still blocked. Against the Supabase pooler, `to_regclass('public.asset_comments')`, `to_regclass('public.media_import_jobs')`, `to_regclass('public.discord_messages_resource_op_idx')`, `to_regprocedure('internal.discord_promote_resources()')`, and `to_regprocedure('internal.discord_promote_resources(boolean)')` all returned `NULL`. A direct `select internal.discord_promote_resources();` attempt failed with `ERROR: schema "internal" does not exist`, so the live import, rerun idempotency check, guild-id verification, and the five regression probes could not be executed on staging.

Implemented the Discord-only resource detail surface in `banodoco-website/src/pages/ResourceDetail/index.tsx`. The page now calls `useAssetComments(resource?.source === 'discord_import' ? resource.id : undefined)`, renders a subtle `From Discord: <channel>` pill near the top, shows a `Made with this` grid from flattened `asset_comment_media` newest-first, and renders a flat chronological `Discussion` list with author chips, relative timestamps, reply previews derived from `reply_to_comment_id`, markdown comment bodies via `AssetDescription`, attachment tiles, reaction chips, and `View on Discord` links built from `comment.discordGuildId`, `comment.discordThreadId`, and `comment.discordMessageId`. All media tiles use anchors with `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"`. As supporting work, `useAssetComments.ts` was corrected to keep text-only comments by filtering deleted junction rows client-side instead of excluding comments with no media. Verification: `npm run build` passed, `npm test -- --run` passed with 17 files / 100 tests, and `pytest --tb=no -q --no-header` still reports the same 7 unrelated repo-wide failures previously seen in this workspace.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: No. Staging still does not have the required Discord-sync schema or promoter function: the relevant `to_regclass(...)` and `to_regprocedure(...)` probes all returned `NULL`, and `select internal.discord_promote_resources();` failed with `schema "internal" does not exist`. That prevented the live guild-id checks, rerun idempotency check, and the five regression validations.

Yes in code. `ResourceDetail` now gates the Discord sections behind `resource.source === 'discord_import'`, all media tiles are rendered through anchored `MediaTile` links with `target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"`, and the `View on Discord` URL is built from `comment.discordGuildId`, `comment.discordThreadId`, and `comment.discordMessageId` with no `GUILD_ID` constant in the file. Manual resources stay on the existing path because the Discord sections do not render unless `source === 'discord_import'`.
